---
title: "Meeting Minutes"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
---

> *(placeholder)* A running record of team meetings, decisions and action items.

## Meeting 1 — _date_

**Present:** _names_

**Agenda:** _topics_

**Decisions:**

- _decision_

**Action items:**

| Owner | Task | Due |
|---|---|---|
| _name_ | _task_ | _date_ |

---

## Meeting 2 — _date_

_..._
